ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Unique stock symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily price record */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the day */,
  "trading_hours" REAL /* Average trading hours for the day */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* After-hours price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjusted_prices" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjusted price record */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading day */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_high_price" REAL /* Adjusted highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "adj_low_price" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "adj_open_price" REAL /* Adjusted opening price of the stock */,
  "adj_volume" INTEGER /* Adjusted volume of trades for the day */,
  "split_factor" REAL /* Split factor applied to the stock price */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adjusted_prices_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend payment */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend announcement */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend payment per share */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend is paid */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the company determines which shareholders are eligible for the dividend */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date the stock starts trading without the dividend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "splits" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split announcement */,
  "split_factor" REAL /* Split factor (e.g., 2 for a 2-for-1 split) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the stock split takes effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_splits_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst rating */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst providing the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Firm the analyst belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)
